MULTIPLE REPORTS OF STREET FLOODING IN THE CITY OF MARQUETTE.
NUMEROUS TREES AND POWER LINES DOWN. DAMAGE REPORTED TO HOMES AND CARS FROM DOWNED TREES. STREET FLOODING ALSO REPORTED.

WIDESPREAD TREE DAMAGE...WITH MOST OCCURRING IN THE 1ST STREET AREA. A TREE FELL ON A CAR AND ANOTHER HAD ROOTS EXPOSED. BOAT AND TRAILER OVERTURNED. 2 TREES FELL INTO POWERLINES AND POLE...SNAPPING THE POLE.
SEVERAL LARGE OAK TREES UPROOTED... YARD FURNITURE OVERTURNED. POWER OUTAGES AND TELEPHONE LINES DOWN IN AREA AS WELL.
LIMBS DOWN 4 INCHES IN DIAMETER ALONG WITH OTHER TREES DOWN AND MINOR DAMAGE TO A SHED IN THE AREA.
NUMEROUS TREES DOWNED ALONG THE SNOWMOBILE/ATV TRAIL IN LA BRANCHE.
